data_type_evidence: generate_mock_results.py:15-88 — simulate_method_results() generates all results using random.seed() and np.random.seed() with hardcoded base success rates (no_feedback=0.20, raw_feedback=0.35, veril_static=0.55, veril_dynamic=0.75)
generate_mock_results.py:49 — success determined by 'result.success = success_roll < base_success_rate' where success_roll is random.random()
generate_mock_results.py:53 — iteration counts generated via np.random.normal(avg_iterations, iteration_variance)
